config.trial_cmd_rule: if dist > target_dist_mm: forward else backward
config.brick_distance_definition: Camera-to-brick distance reported by vision at observation time (mm).

trials.curve_source: calibrate_dist.py with ArucoBrickVision at 126mm distance at 1% speed
